exceptions.reason: role is only "alert" when tone==="danger". Every other tone (info, success, warning, neutral -- including the default) renders role="status" instead, which is a different, more polite live region than this pattern requires. This binding stays on alert rather than moving to status on purpose, even though status is what most instances actually render: alert is the safety-relevant contract, the one that matters when Alert is carrying a condition the user must not miss, and a silent downgrade to the calmer pattern would describe the case that matters least. The exception records that only the danger tone actually earns it; every other tone is documented here as falling short of the pattern this binds, not as evidence the pattern should change.
